Notes: MSU's Jenny Groom Sets career-high for points with 27.
and has second double-double of season and eighth of career.
MSU's Kris Wolle establishes new career-high for rebounds with 12
Game.Officials: Mike Vipond,  Anne Nehring,  Jon McLean
